text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمُرْتَدِّ فَقَالَ مَنْ رَغِبَ عَنِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَ كَفَرَ بِمَا أُنْزِلَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بَعْدَ إِسْلَامِهِ فَلَا تَوْبَةَ لَهُ وَ قَدْ وَجَبَ قَتْلُهُ وَ بَانَتْ مِنْهُ امْرَأَتُهُ وَ يُقْسَمُ مَا تَرَكَ عَلَى وُلْدِهِ.

en.hubeali: And from him, from Al A’ala, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,

‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about the apostate. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who wishes to be away from Al-Islam, and disbelieve with what was Revealed unto Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> after his Islam. So there is no repentance for him, and his being killed is Obligated, and his wife is irrevocably divorced from him, and whatever he leaves would be distributed upon his children’.
